ControlDescription: A policy on access control shall be established documented and reviewed
ProjectActivity: Defined least-privilege RBAC matrix mapping each of 16 roles to minimum required entitlements per system

ControlName: Access to Networks and Network Services
ControlDescription: Users shall only be provided access to the network and network services that they have been specifically authorized to use
ProjectActivity: Entitlement baseline enforced per role — no user holds entitlements outside their job function (post-remediation)

ControlDescription: A formal user registration and de-registration process shall be implemented
ProjectActivity: 26 users provisioned in Keycloak with formal role assignments tied to HR records in users.csv

ControlDescription: A formal user access provisioning process shall be implemented to assign or revoke access rights
ProjectActivity: Keycloak realm import used as provisioning mechanism; remediation_log.csv documents formal revocation process

ControlDescription: Asset owners shall review users' access rights at regular intervals
ProjectActivity: Access certification campaign conducted — 69 entitlements reviewed 5 revoked 4 exceptions documented

ControlName: Removal or Adjustment of Access Rights
ControlDescription: Access rights of all employees and external party users to information shall be removed upon termination
ProjectActivity: Revocation of 4 drifted entitlements executed and logged with reviewer identity and justification

ControlDescription: Access to information and application system functions shall be restricted in accordance with the access control policy
ProjectActivity: SoD ruleset defined and enforced — critical fraud-enabling entitlement combinations identified and remediated

ControlDescription: Develop document and disseminate an access control policy
ProjectActivity: RBAC design documented in org-design.md with entitlement catalog sensitivity ratings and SoD-sensitive pairs identified at design time

ControlDescription: Manage information system accounts including establishing activating modifying reviewing disabling and removing accounts
ProjectActivity: All 26 accounts created in Keycloak with role assignments; access certification campaign conducted for periodic review

ControlDescription: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources
ProjectActivity: Keycloak IdP enforces role-based access; baseline defined in rbac_matrix.csv; post-remediation state verified clean

ControlDescription: Identify and document separation of duties conflicts; define and implement access control policies to prevent conflicts
ProjectActivity: 4 SoD rules defined; 9 violations detected across 5 users; critical violations revoked; design-time conflicts documented with compensating controls

ControlDescription: Employ the principle of least privilege allowing only authorized accesses for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks
ProjectActivity: 16 roles designed with minimum entitlements; drift detected in 4 users and remediated; sensitivity levels assigned per entitlement

ControlDescription: Establish and document usage restrictions configuration and implementation guidance for each type of remote access
ProjectActivity: Keycloak provides centralized authentication for all system access; admin console access restricted to IT Director and IAM Admin roles

ControlDescription: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function
ProjectActivity: Keycloak provides audit logging of authentication and admin events; access certification campaign creates human audit trail
